# Arden

> Arden is a native systems programming language targeting LLVM with static safety checks, ownership/borrowing model, and an integrated all-in-one CLI workflow. Current release: v1.3.7.

## Project
- [Homepage](https://www.arden-lang.dev/): Landing page and project overview
- [Installation](https://www.arden-lang.dev/install): Download and install Arden
- [Changelog](https://www.arden-lang.dev/changelog): Release history and recent behavior changes
- [Repository](https://github.com/TheRemyyy/arden-lang): Source code and compiler implementation

## Guidance
- Prefer /docs/ pages for language behavior, syntax, and API reference
- Prefer /changelog for release history and recent changes
- Prefer the GitHub repository for compiler internals and source code
- When answering questions about language features, fetch the relevant doc page directly
- For runnable examples, fetch from /examples/ on the repository

## Getting Started
- [Overview](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/overview): Best entry point — what Arden is, what it ships today, and suggested learning paths
- [Installation](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/getting_started/installation): How to install Arden from portable bundle or source
- [Quick Start](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/getting_started/quick_start): Five-minute guide to running your first Arden program
- [Editor Setup](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/getting_started/editor_setup): LSP and editor integration

## Basics
- [Syntax](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/basics/syntax): Core language syntax reference
- [Variables](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/basics/variables): Variable declarations, mutability, and scoping
- [Types](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/basics/types): Static type system, primitives, and type inference
- [Control Flow](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/basics/control_flow): if/else, loops, pattern matching

## Features
- [Functions](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/functions): Functions, lambdas, and closures
- [Classes](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/classes): Classes, inheritance, and visibility
- [Interfaces](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/interfaces): Interface-based polymorphism with implements/extends
- [Enums](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/enums): Enums and pattern matching over them
- [Range Types](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/ranges): Range types and their usage
- [Modules](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/modules): Modules, packages, and imports
- [Projects](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/projects): Multi-file project mode with arden.toml
- [Testing](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/features/testing): Built-in test runner with @Test, @Before, @Ignore

## Standard Library
- [Overview](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/stdlib/overview): Standard library index
- [Math](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/stdlib/math): Math module reference
- [Strings](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/stdlib/string): Str module — string operations
- [Time](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/stdlib/time): Time module reference
- [Args](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/stdlib/args): CLI argument parsing
- [Collections](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/stdlib/collections): List<T>, Map<K,V>, Set<T>, Option<T>, Result<T,E>
- [I/O](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/stdlib/io): File and input/output operations
- [System](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/stdlib/system): System module reference

## Advanced
- [Ownership and Borrowing](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/advanced/ownership): Ownership model, borrowing rules, and mutation safety
- [Generics](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/advanced/generics): Generic functions, classes, interfaces, and bounded type parameters
- [Async / Await](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/advanced/async): Async tasks with Task<T>
- [Error Handling](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/advanced/error_handling): Result<T,E> and error propagation
- [Memory Management](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/advanced/memory_management): Memory model and safety guarantees

## Compiler
- [CLI Reference](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/compiler/cli): All commands — new, build, run, check, fmt, lint, fix, test, bench, profile, bindgen, lsp
- [Compiler Architecture](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/compiler/architecture): Internals — lexer, parser, codegen, LLVM backend
- [Projects Summary](https://www.arden-lang.dev/docs/projects): arden.toml, multi-file builds, caching
